glosses.ro: a se strădui; a depune efort

translations.en: I'm trying hard to arrive on time.
translations.es: Me esfuerzo por llegar a tiempo.
translations.it: Mi impegno ad arrivare in orario.
translations.pt: Estou me esforçando para chegar no horário.
translations.vi: Tôi đang cố gắng đến đúng giờ.
translations.ar: أحاول جاهدًا الوصول في الوقت المحدد.
translations.nl: Ik doe mijn best om op tijd aan te komen.
translations.hi: मैं समय पर पहुँचने की पूरी कोशिश कर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Προσπαθώ πολύ να φτάσω στην ώρα μου.
translations.nb: Jeg gjør mitt beste for å komme i tide.
translations.id: Saya berusaha keras untuk tiba tepat waktu.
translations.sv: Jag anstränger mig för att komma i tid.
translations.ro: Mă străduiesc să ajung la timp.
translations.da: Jeg gør mit bedste for at komme til tiden.
translations.ja: 時間通りに着くように頑張っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; grammatical subject of the sentence.
Finite form (present, 1sg) of the pronominal verb ‘s’efforcer’; includes the elided reflexive clitic ‘me’ (m’). Main verb meaning ‘to try hard/strive’.
Infinitive verb ‘arriver’ introduced by the elided preposition ‘de’ (d’); complements ‘s’efforcer de’.
Preposition introducing a prepositional phrase.
Common noun ‘heure’ with elided definite article ‘le’ (l’); object of ‘à’. In the fixed phrase ‘à l’heure’ meaning ‘on time’.

sentences.target: On s'efforce de trier les déchets.

translations.fr: On s'efforce de trier les déchets.
translations.en: We try hard to sort the trash.
translations.es: Nos esforzamos por separar la basura.
translations.de: Wir bemühen uns, den Müll zu trennen.
translations.it: Ci impegniamo a separare i rifiuti.
translations.pt: Nos esforçamos para separar o lixo.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi cố gắng phân loại rác.
translations.nl: We doen ons best om het afval te scheiden.
translations.hi: हम कूड़े को अलग करने की पूरी कोशिश करते हैं.
translations.el: Προσπαθούμε πολύ να διαχωρίζουμε τα σκουπίδια.
translations.nb: Vi gjør vårt beste for å sortere søppel.
translations.id: Kami berusaha keras untuk memilah sampah.
translations.sv: Vi anstränger oss för att sortera soporna.
translations.da: Vi gør vores bedste for at sortere affaldet.
translations.ja: ごみを分別するよう努めています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun referring to people in general (often equivalent to ‘we’ in spoken French).
Finite form (present, 3sg) of the pronominal verb ‘s’efforcer’; includes the elided reflexive clitic ‘se’ (s’). Main verb.
Preposition ‘de’ introducing an infinitival complement of ‘s’efforcer’.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of ‘s’efforcer de’.
Definite article, plural; determiner of the following noun.
Common noun, plural; direct object of ‘trier’.

translations.en: We are trying to be patient.
translations.de: Wir bemühen uns, geduldig zu sein.
translations.pt: Estamos nos esforçando para ser pacientes.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang cố gắng kiên nhẫn.
translations.nl: We doen ons best om geduldig te zijn.
translations.hi: हम धैर्य रखने की पूरी कोशिश कर रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi gjør vårt beste for å være tålmodige.
translations.sv: Vi anstränger oss för att vara tålmodiga.
translations.da: Vi gør vores bedste for at være tålmodige.
translations.ja: 私たちは辛抱強くあるよう努めています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person plural; grammatical subject.
Reflexive clitic pronoun, 1st person plural; required by the pronominal verb; corefers with the subject.
Finite form (present, 1pl) of the pronominal verb ‘s’efforcer’; main verb.
Infinitive ‘être’ introduced by elided ‘de’ (d’); complements ‘s’efforcer de’.
Adjective, plural; predicate complement of ‘être’, agreeing in number (and gender by context) with the subject.

sentences.target: Je vais m'efforcer de terminer aujourd'hui.

translations.fr: Je vais m'efforcer de terminer aujourd'hui.
translations.en: I'm going to try hard to finish today.
translations.es: Voy a esforzarme por terminar hoy.
translations.de: Ich werde mich bemühen, heute fertig zu werden.
translations.pt: Vou me esforçar para terminar hoje.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ cố gắng hết sức để hoàn thành hôm nay.
translations.nl: Ik ga mijn best doen om het vandaag af te maken.
translations.hi: मैं आज खत्म करने की पूरी कोशिश करूँगा.
translations.el: Θα προσπαθήσω πολύ να τελειώσω σήμερα.
translations.nb: Jeg skal gjøre mitt beste for å bli ferdig i dag.
translations.id: Saya akan berusaha keras untuk menyelesaikannya hari ini.
translations.sv: Jag ska anstränga mig för att bli klar i dag.
translations.ro: O să mă străduiesc să termin azi.
translations.da: Jeg vil gøre mit bedste for at blive færdig i dag.
translations.fi: Yritän kovasti saada sen valmiiksi tänään.
translations.ja: 今日中に終わらせるよう頑張ります。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; grammatical subject.
Auxiliary ‘aller’ (present, 1sg) forming the futur proche; selects an infinitive.
Infinitive form of the pronominal verb ‘s’efforcer’; includes elided reflexive clitic ‘me’ (m’); complement of ‘aller’.
Preposition introducing an infinitival complement of ‘s’efforcer’.
Infinitive verb complement of ‘s’efforcer de’.
Adverb of time modifying the predicate.
